name: grammar-bootstrap
description: Describe 8 objects with 3 properties each using max 15 symbols.
task_a: You can see world-state.json with 8 objects. Each has a type, color, and position. Communicate ALL 8 objects to Agent B so B can reconstruct the full list. Write ANSWER.md when B confirms understanding.
task_b: Agent A will describe 8 objects to you. Each has a type, color, and position. Reconstruct the complete list and write it to ANSWER.md. Confirm with A when you think you have them all correct.
